title: Children accommodated in secure children's homes: 31 March 2025
body: "This release gives statistics on children accommodated in secure children’s homes at 31 March 2025. It includes data from England and Wales.  It includes information on the number of approved places and children accommodated by:   sex age length of stay type of placement ethnicity    Looked-after children statistics teamEmail cla.stats@education.gov.uk  "
